directive.title: Basic RFQ list and detail pages with static data

auditor.summary: The generated code is critically incomplete. Four of the eight required files (the two page components, RFQTable, and RFQDetailCard) were not generated due to output truncation. Additionally, the LoadingSpinner component imports a non-existent utility module ('@/lib/utils') and the ErrorBoundary imports from 'lucide-react' which is not in the project dependencies. These issues will cause TypeScript compilation failures. The mock data and type definitions are well-structured, and the error boundary and loading components show good patterns, but the build cannot function without the missing page and table components. The build requires significant rework to meet the acceptance criteria.

top_issues.description: Required page component was not generated. The build specification explicitly requires this file to be created.
Required detail page component was not generated. The build specification explicitly requires this file to be created.
Required table component was not generated. This is a core component for the listing page.
